sql: SELECT u1.email, u1.country_code, u1.signup_date, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id > 479
SELECT l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 ORDER BY l1.post_id
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.content, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id = 780
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.content, p1.user_id, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.post_id, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id > 661
SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at <= DATETIME('now', '-13 days') ORDER BY f1.follower_id
SELECT c1.id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id < 984 ORDER BY c1.created_at
SELECT p1.content FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id > 490 ORDER BY p1.id LIMIT 91
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.created_at < DATETIME('now', '-21 days') ORDER BY c1.post_id
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 LIMIT 4
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id = 147 LIMIT 84
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id > 834
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1
SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 ORDER BY f1.followee_id LIMIT 6
SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.created_at, c1.post_id, c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id < 597 LIMIT 12
SELECT u1.email, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id >= 744 LIMIT 16
SELECT f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1
SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 LIMIT 48
SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.id, p1.view_count FROM posts AS p1 LIMIT 12
SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id <> 215 LIMIT 29
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 LEFT JOIN users AS u3 ON p1.user_id = u3.id WHERE u3.signup_date <= DATETIME('now', '-17 days')
SELECT f1.followee_id, u9.email, u9.signup_date FROM follows AS f1 INNER JOIN users AS u9 ON f1.follower_id = u9.id
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN posts AS p5 ON c1.post_id = p5.id
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 LEFT JOIN users AS u6 ON f1.follower_id = u6.id
SELECT l3.liked_at, l3.user_id, l3.post_id, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 LEFT JOIN likes AS l3 ON p1.id = l3.post_id
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 INNER JOIN users AS u5 ON c1.user_id = u5.id WHERE u5.email = 'user41@example.com'
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 LEFT JOIN posts AS p8 ON l1.post_id = p8.id WHERE p8.content <> '123'
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 FULL JOIN posts AS p4 ON l1.post_id = p4.id WHERE p4.user_id < 606
SELECT c1.created_at, c1.user_id, p7.posted_at, p7.user_id FROM comments AS c1 LEFT JOIN posts AS p7 ON c1.post_id = p7.id WHERE p7.content = 'user'
SELECT c1.post_id, c1.id, c1.created_at, u1.username FROM comments AS c1 LEFT JOIN users AS u1 ON c1.user_id = u1.id
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN posts AS p1 ON c1.post_id = p1.id WHERE p1.id <> 582
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 RIGHT JOIN posts AS p4 ON u1.id = p4.user_id
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u1 ON f1.follower_id = u1.id
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 FULL JOIN posts AS p7 ON l1.post_id = p7.id WHERE p7.content = 'user'
SELECT c1.id, c1.created_at, p4.content, p4.id FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN posts AS p4 ON c1.post_id = p4.id
SELECT l9.liked_at, l9.user_id, l9.post_id, u1.id FROM users AS u1 RIGHT JOIN likes AS l9 ON u1.id = l9.user_id WHERE l9.user_id <> 789
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u3 ON c1.user_id = u3.id WHERE u3.email LIKE '%@gmail.com'
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u2 ON c1.user_id = u2.id WHERE u2.id = 579
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 INNER JOIN users AS u3 ON f1.follower_id = u3.id
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 FULL JOIN users AS u7 ON c1.user_id = u7.id WHERE u7.is_verified = 1
SELECT u1.is_verified, u1.id FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id IN (SELECT sub_p.user_id FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.posted_at <= DATETIME('now', '-28 days'))
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts AS inner_posts WHERE inner_posts.user_id <> 445) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.content = 'admin'
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id
SELECT p1.content, p1.view_count, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM comments AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.post_id = p1.id AND sub_c.post_id <= 355)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM likes AS inner_likes WHERE inner_likes.liked_at >= DATETIME('now', '-18 days')) AS derived_table
SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.id = f1.follower_id AND sub_u.signup_date < DATETIME('now', '-12 days'))
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.id < 72)
SELECT p1.content, p1.posted_at, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id IN (SELECT sub_l.post_id FROM likes AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.liked_at <= DATETIME('now', '-15 days'))
SELECT f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.email <> 'user62@example.com')
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts AS inner_posts WHERE inner_posts.id >= 347) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.content <> '123'
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.id, p1.content, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM comments AS sub_c WHERE sub_c.post_id = p1.id AND sub_c.comment_text <> 'test')
SELECT c1.id AS comment1, c2.id AS comment2, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 JOIN comments AS c2 ON c1.post_id = c2.post_id AND c1.id <> c2.id
SELECT c1.id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.view_count = 662)
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id IN (SELECT sub_l.user_id FROM likes AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.post_id < 719)
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.liked_at, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.view_count < 860)
SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id LIMIT 11
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM follows AS inner_follows WHERE inner_follows.followee_id <> 23) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts AS inner_posts WHERE inner_posts.posted_at < DATETIME('now', '-12 days')) AS derived_table
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.id = l1.user_id AND sub_u.id <= 866)
SELECT u1.id, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-13 days') UNION SELECT u2.id, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.id >= 595

SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id = 153 UNION SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.user_id, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.liked_at >= DATETIME('now', '-1 days') ORDER BY liked_at LIMIT 24

SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id = 152 UNION SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.follower_id, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id = 606

SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id = 476 UNION ALL SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.follower_id, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.follower_id < 303 LIMIT 44

SELECT l1.post_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id >= 376 UNION ALL SELECT l2.post_id, l2.liked_at FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.liked_at < DATETIME('now', '-9 days') ORDER BY post_id LIMIT 34
SELECT u1.username, u1.id FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.email <> 'user32@example.com' UNION ALL SELECT u2.username, u2.id FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.email LIKE 'user%@%'
SELECT c1.id, c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.id > 770 UNION SELECT c2.id, c2.user_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.user_id < 683 ORDER BY id LIMIT 14
SELECT u1.country_code, u1.is_verified, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id <> 325 UNION SELECT u2.country_code, u2.is_verified, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.username LIKE '%a%'

SELECT u1.country_code, u1.is_verified, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-22 days') UNION ALL SELECT u2.country_code, u2.is_verified, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.username = 'admin' LIMIT 25

SELECT p1.user_id, p1.content, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at <= DATETIME('now', '-4 days') UNION SELECT p2.user_id, p2.content, p2.posted_at FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.view_count <> 832 LIMIT 42

SELECT u1.id, u1.country_code, u1.signup_date, u1.email FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id < 11 UNION SELECT u2.id, u2.country_code, u2.signup_date, u2.email FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-25 days')
SELECT u1.email, u1.is_verified, u1.id FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id > 256 UNION ALL SELECT u2.email, u2.is_verified, u2.id FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.username LIKE '%c'
SELECT c1.id, c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.comment_text = 'test' UNION ALL SELECT c2.id, c2.user_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.user_id = 980 ORDER BY id

SELECT c1.post_id, c1.id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.created_at <= DATETIME('now', '-23 days') UNION SELECT c2.post_id, c2.id, c2.comment_text FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.post_id <= 404 LIMIT 45
SELECT u1.id, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code LIKE '%a%' UNION SELECT u2.id, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.signup_date <= DATETIME('now', '-10 days')
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id <> 293 UNION ALL SELECT l2.user_id, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id <= 777

SELECT l1.post_id, l1.liked_at, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id <> 443 UNION SELECT l2.post_id, l2.liked_at, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.liked_at >= DATETIME('now', '-20 days') LIMIT 15
SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.id < 320 UNION SELECT c2.comment_text, c2.id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.post_id >= 923

SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at > DATETIME('now', '-13 days') UNION SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.liked_at < DATETIME('now', '-7 days') LIMIT 30

SELECT u1.is_verified, u1.id, u1.email, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.username <> 'activity' UNION SELECT u2.is_verified, u2.id, u2.email, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.country_code LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY is_verified
